title: Blood of the Bat heals half actual attack damage

card.rawText: Heal the equipped creature for 1/2 of the Atk damage it inflicts.

plan.title: Blood of the Bat heals half actual attack damage
plan.summary: Equipped attacker deals deterministic damage and heals half actual inflicted damage rounded up.

notes: Set equipped attacker current HP to 80 before battle. Equip Blood of the Bat to attacker.

steps: Start combat with equipped attacker attacking defender.
Resolve forced hit and damage rolls.
Apply 10 actual attack damage to defender.
Resolve Blood of the Bat healing trigger.

expectedAssertions.label: Equipped attacker heals half rounded up
Heal does not exceed max HP

manualVerification: Repeat with odd actual damage 9 to confirm CEIL heals 5.
riskNotes: No registered runtime route for HEAL_BY_DAMAGE_DEALT.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Action type HEAL_BY_DAMAGE_DEALT currently has no runtime route.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
